review_title: An excellent tool for Software Defect Tracking.
description: Overall I was extremely happy with DevTrack. I was able to quickly spin up new projects and teams were able to come online and start tracking defects very quickly. The reporting features were powerful. It was just a very great tool .
author: T. Ryan A.
pros: I was the primary administrator for THQ's DevTrack solution for nearly 5 years. The system was extremely reliable and flexible in terms of it's accessibility and adaptability. At THQ we had about 30 to 40 active projects going at a time with teams that ranged in size form 10 people to 300. In many cases the development teams were located at different studios around the world. DevTrack needed to be flexible enough to meet the needs of those groups and be flexible enough to accommodate different bug tracking workflows.
cons: DevTrack's was somewhat difficult to configure and update. Tech Excel's support team was fantastic and helped me through many upgrades over the year, but I am not confident that I would have been able to properly configure it without their help as there are many aspects of the initial installation that were somewhat obtuse.

description: Other one of the best feature I can state is the integration with other software Devtest which is used for writing test cases.
author: Arin M.
pros: Setting up a project in the devtrack tool is easy. We can even link the project in devtrack to the requirements or can also setup as a standalone project. Tracking is easier and works great. And project manager can add users easily. We can even choose & implement the methodology as per our need. Managing different releases in Devtrack is great and it works seamless.
cons: I feel that the look and feel of the software is now outdated. Though it has very good features but the overall UI needs an upgrade.

review_title: It's a bit outdated compared to newer products
description: We used devtrack for many years and it was very difficult to get the data out of the system. I couldn't ever understand how to query or get reports simply. It should be easy to see what cases you created or how many cases are from a certain area, but it isn't.
author: Glen C.
pros: We used if for many years so it did the job and R&D and Support used it together.
cons: It isn't up to date, per the last release I experienced. Also reporting was very challenging and not user friendly.

review_title: DevTrack: Go-To for Efficient Task and Bug Management
author: Sugam P.
pros: I've been using DevTrack for a while now, and it's safe to say that it has become the go-to tool for bug tracking and project management. The ability to link bugs, view ownership history, and attach various types of media to tasks is a real game-changer. A standout feature is the ability to branch tasks, allowing us to create a clear workflow history and keep an eye on how bugs evolve and how tasks progress.
cons: There can be redundancies within workflows which can lead to complexities in task management and potentially create inefficiencies in project planning and execution. I have to carefully consider how to structure the workflows within DevTrack. Sometimes, the user interface can also be overwhelming and complicated as well.

review_title: This is a fairly complicated software
author: Bob S.
pros: There are a lot of features available and a ton of customization options to create the workflow our company needed.
cons: The software just seems to be a bit more complicated than necessary. The custom reporting is cumbersome and I have a fair amount of difficulty getting the information I want on my reports.

review_title: DevTrack: One of the best project management tool
author: Bishal D.
pros: As a developer, I find DevTrack to be an invaluable tool in my day-to-day work. It simplifies task management by allowing me to organize and prioritize my coding tasks effortlessly. The real-time collaboration features facilitate smooth communication within my development team, reducing the need for constant meetings and emails.
cons: When I first started using DevTrack, it was a bit confusing. It took some time to figure out how to set up custom workflows and use all its features effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Among the top project management softwares
author: Roshish S.
pros: I use DevTrack every day because it is such a useful tool for developers like me. It makes task management easier by making it simple for me to arrange and rank my coding tasks. My development team can communicate effectively because to the real-time collaboration tools, which eliminate the need for ongoing meetings and emails.
cons: I found DevTrack to be a little confusing when I initially started using it. Understanding how to create unique workflows and utilize all of its features well takes some time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and modify, seamless experience
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's simple, to-the-point, and allows for a good amount of control and customization. Customer service is quick to respond.
cons: There have been a few minor issues with getting the DevAdmin software running. However, we are in the process of getting that ironed out with customer support.

author: Bijay S.
pros: very simple, to the point, and allows for a good amount of control and customization
cons: It was a bit confusing. It took me some time to understand the flow. After that it became easy and simple.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A great approach for task management and bug tracking.
author: Prekshya D.
pros: I have been using DevTrack for quite a while now and I must say that it has immediately helped manage a project and is very efficient for bug tracking. It has a very simple , clean UI yet effective features such as workflow history, linking tasks and works seamlessly.
cons: The software can be seemed to be a little complicated at first , but as you go on you'll get used to it. As a new user, it takes time to adapt to new software and understand how to create workflows and utilize the software at max.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ronald S.
pros: I can master my platforms errors when coding my software in it's alpha, beta, kappa, stages.
cons: Nothing really. Takes long to complete the formula process. But, overall, pretty precise.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Among the most effective project management applications
author: Rojen C.
pros: I rely on DevTrack on a basis because it proves to be an asset, for developers like myself. It simplifies the process of managing tasks by providing a user platform to organize and prioritize my coding assignments. The real-time collaboration tools allow my development team to communicate efficiently eliminating the need, for meetings and lengthy email exchanges.
cons: As a new user of DevTrack, I initially found it slightly confusing. Like any new tool, it takes time to understand how to create customized workflows and utilize its full range of capabilities efficiently.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ozone B.
pros: DevTrack is a simple and to-the-point bug tracking application that provides a decent amount of control and customization. It has a clean and simple User Interface. It provides features such as creating workflow history, link other media, history of ownership, and linking tasks and bugs.
cons: DevTrack can initially feel difficult to configure and keep up to date. It also has a bit of learning curve, and setting up custom workflows at the beginning and making use of all of its features can be difficult at first.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Functional and Efficient though lacking in UI
author: Purna S.
pros: I find DevTrack to be very useful in the daily tracking of tasks. I can communicate with the team in a concise and efficient way.
cons: The learning curve is a bit tricky and the UI could be modernised.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Needs to embrace cloud and add ease of use to the product
description: We used to have Devtrack to maintain bugs etc. but it was clunky and features were not always the most user-friendly. It got the job done but had performance issues etc. Hope it becomes easier to use and embraces cloud for teams across the globe without incurring performance/access issues,
author: Abhijit D.
